trial_title: Conduction system pacing in heart failure without a compelling CRT indication

inclusion_categorical.source_text: Patients with heart failure as defined by European Society of Cardiology guidelines

exclusion_quantitative.source_text: Severe chronic kidney disease (eGFR ≤20 mL/kg/min or dialysis)

unparseable: AND LVEF <50% OR LVEF ≥50% and objective evidence of cardiac structural and/or functional abnormalities consistent with the presence of LV diastolic dysfunction/raised filling pressures
